/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -g -fno-rtti -fno-exceptions -ffp-contract=on -faligned-allocation -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -pthread CMakeFiles/PerformanceTest.dir/Users/eimantas/Repositories/JoltPhysics/PerformanceTest/PerformanceTest.cpp.o -o PerformanceTest  libJolt.a -framework Foundation -framework Metal -framework MetalKit
